_meta.keyKnowledge: We curate and present our visual arts practice and artworks to communicate ideas and meaning to audiences.

_source.w: We curate and present our visual arts practice and artworks to communicate ideas and meaning to audiences.
y: Curating our work teaches us that how art is presented affects how it is experienced and understood.
Presenting our practice — not just finished works — reveals the depth of our creative thinking.
Exhibition skills prepare us for sharing our work in professional and community contexts.
eg: We curate a selection of our work that tells a coherent story about our artistic investigation.
We present our visual arts practice including experiments, development work and resolved pieces.
We design an exhibition layout that enhances the viewer's experience of our work.
We write curatorial statements explaining the ideas behind our exhibition choices.
We present our work in both physical and digital formats for different audiences.
We participate in formal critique sessions, discussing artistic choices and their effectiveness.
